g.text: Frontend: Performs basic format validation to provide

text.font-family: Nunito, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: immediate feedback to the user (e.g., checking if the email

text.font-family: Nunito, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: follows a valid format like user@example.com).

g.text: validation can be bypassed. The backend should never trust
